quicksight.theme.AwsAccountId.Description: The ID of the AWS account where you want to store the new theme.

quicksight.theme.BaseThemeId.Description: The ID of the theme that a custom theme will inherit from. All themes inherit from one of the starting themes defined by Amazon QuickSight. For a list of the starting themes, use `ListThemes` or choose **Themes** from within an analysis.

quicksight.theme.Configuration.Description: The theme configuration, which contains the theme display properties.

quicksight.theme.Name.Description: A display name for the theme.

quicksight.theme.Permissions.Description: A valid grouping of resource permissions to apply to the new theme.

quicksight.theme.Tags.Description: A map of the key-value pairs for the resource tag or tags that you want to add to the resource.

quicksight.theme.ThemeId.Description: An ID for the theme that you want to create. The theme ID is unique per AWS Region in each AWS account.

quicksight.theme.VersionDescription.Description: A description of the first version of the theme that you're creating. Every time `UpdateTheme` is called, a new version is created. Each version of the theme has a description of the version in the `VersionDescription` field.
